title: Senior Executive / Executive (Student Recruitment Partnership)
description:
Student Recruitment

  • Conduct all campus tours and tapping on relevant propositions and strengths of the institution to seize sales closures.

  • Attend to international students’ queries via phone, email and/or face-to-face.

  • Conduct regular and timely follow-up with prospective international students to meet enrolment targets.

  • Participate in recruitment fairs/seminars/events.

  • Handle enrolment-related administrative works

  • Maintain an updated & presentable sales kit and marketing collaterals of all assigned programmes.

  • Develop and maintain good working relationships with stakeholders to drive and achieve the recruitment target.


Lead Management

  • Follow up with all inquiries and accurately update the progress in CRM.

  • Provide accurate and prompt advice with regards to admission requirements and programmes benefits to prospective students.

  • Assist newly enrolled students with enrolment process.

  • Work with Country Managers (CMs) to build and secure sales pipelines.

  • Provide weekly Lead & Sales Report, Analysis & Action Plans


Channel Relationship Development and Management

  • Coordinate with stakeholders (such as Recruitment Partners, CMs, other cross- functional personnel, etc) to deliver and meet partner expectations.

  • Coordinate and work with CMs to accommodate and maximize campus visits.

  • Support CMs in all areas pertaining to marketing and students recruitment activities such as Open House and Study Tours

  • Ensure high satisfaction rate from all-stakeholders (students, parents, agents) and seek good reviews to ensure positive outreach.


Others

  • Ensure compliance to EduTrust requirements in all marketing and recruitment activities performed.

  • Any other ad-hoc duties as required by the company from time to time.


Requirements

  • Degree in any fields with 1-2 years of experience.
  • Self-motivated and result-driven with a proven track record of consistent sales achievement.
  • Service-oriented and flexible, able to engage with a range of prospective customers across various programmes levels.
  • Ability to work under pressure.
  • Team orientated with good interpersonal skills.
  • Possess good communication skills and ability to speak fluent Mandarin and English. We are seeking candidates proficient in Mandarin to effectively communicate with Mandarin-speaking parents/students.
  • Willing to work on weekends when needed (Typically 1 Sat/Sun per month)



We regret to inform you that only shortlisted candidates will be notified.

postedCompany.description:
Once known as Singapore’s Productivity and Standards Board, PSB Academy is known today as “The Future Academy”, with an approach to education that focuses on what really matters: performance in the New Economy. In 2019, the Academy was conferred “Best Educational Institute - Singapore” by APAC Insider and earned 2 consecutive SBR National Business Awards in 2017/18 in the Education category for outstanding work in the region.

Today, we host over 12,000 students from over 50 nationalities with our slate of certificate, diploma, degree and short courses every year.
postedCompany.name: PSB ACADEMY PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
